title: Indian Badminton Adopts New 3x15 Scoring System Domestically
indian_angle: This new scoring system will be implemented across all major domestic events in India, impacting players from junior to senior categories.
summary: Badminton Association of India will implement a new 3x15 scoring system across all major domestic events, including ranking tournaments and national championships, starting with the Ernakulam Senior Ranking tournament.

title: Srikanth Retires Hurt at Canada Open; Aakarshi, Tanya Progress
indian_angle: Kidambi Srikanth's injury retirement is a concern, while Aakarshi Kashyap and Tanya Hemanth's advancement offers a positive note for Indian fans.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth retired from his Canada Open match due to injury, but Aakarshi Kashyap and Tanya Hemanth managed to advance to the next round, despite a generally dismal showing from other Indian shuttlers.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form despite ultimately falling short of the title.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title, finishing as the runner-up against Su Li Yang.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No. 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan delivered a significant upset by defeating a top-ranked player at the US Open.
summary: Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a major upset at the US Open Super 300 by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen.

title: BAI Releases Addendum for Asia U17 & U15 Junior Selection
indian_angle: This addendum clarifies the selection process for India's promising young badminton talents aiming for the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships.
summary: Badminton Association of India issued a further addendum to the selection criteria for the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Reunites for Asian Games; Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: The reassembly of the Thomas Cup squad, including the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, signals India's preparations for the Asian Games.
summary: The Thomas Cup squad has reassembled to prepare for the Asian Games, with Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand making their return to the team.
